source_pr.title: executor: fix data too long in union statement with select null and select varchar
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: AilinKid <314806019@qq.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22179

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
For type null column, although the eval type is a string, it still should be returned with `CoercibilityIgnorable` rather than `CoercibilityImplicit` in deriveCoercibilityForColumn(),  which will lead it to use high coercibility with `utf8mb4` collation rather than `binary` itself in DeriveCollationFromExprs() when a null column is unioned with a utf8mb4 column.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- executor: fix data too long in union statement with select null and select varchar.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from (select null as a union all select a from t) aaa order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil>", "aaaaaaaaa", "天王盖地虎宝塔镇河妖")) (expression/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from (select null as a union all select a from t) aaa order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil>", "aaaaaaaaa", "天王盖地虎宝塔镇河妖")) (expression/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select * from (select null as a union all select a from t) aaa order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil>", "aaaaaaaaa", "天王盖地虎宝塔镇河妖")) (expression/integration_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select * from (select null as a union all select a from t) aaa order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil>", "aaaaaaaaa", "天王盖地虎宝塔镇河妖")) (expression/integration_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from (select null as a union all select a from t) aaa order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil>", "aaaaaaaaa", "天王盖地虎宝塔镇河妖")) (expression/integration_test.go)
